summary: The answer correctly identifies that A5 dot project-local context should be loaded first, specifically context/projects/active_projects.md, knowledge/projects/current_projects_2026_07_07.md, and high-signal A5 NAS-root materials before interpreting PL dispersion or peak tracking. It appropriately avoids global moire-paper context and notes the limitation that exact A5 files are not present in the supplied context. Citations are useful but file-level and one citation label is slightly awkward/malformed.
